generated_oml:
instance ThermometerInside1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for inside temperature monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance ThermometerInside2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for inside temperature monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance ThermometerOutside : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for outside temperature monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance VoltageSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Voltage measurement sensor for power supply"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VoltageDataTransmission
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current measurement sensor for power supply"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmission
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ThermometerInside1, ThermometerInside2, ThermometerOutside
]

instance VoltageDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VoltageSensor
]

instance CurrentDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature measurements from all sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LowLevelDriver
]

instance VoltageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Power supply voltage measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VoltageDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipy
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Power supply current measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipy
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with two parameters: C_air, G_box assuming uniform heat transfer"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipy
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with four parameters: C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box accounting for heatbed thermal inertia"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipy
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance PythonScipy : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python with Scipy for non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance LowLevelDriver : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Low-level driver software for hardware abstraction and sensor data acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates thermal behavior using Model A and Model B for temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibrates thermal models using non-linear least squares optimization with Scipy"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterCalibrationInsight
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitors real-time temperature deviations and safety violations"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureDeviationInsight, SafetyViolationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detects faults and triggers control adjustments for the physical system"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustHeatingDurationAction, AdjustWaitingDurationAction
]

instance TemperatureDeviationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Indicates temperature deviation from setpoint"
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Indicates safety violation such as overheating"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values from simulation models"
]

instance ParameterCalibrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated thermal model parameters"
]

instance AdjustHeatingDurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusts heating duration (H) in bang-bang controller"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustWaitingDurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusts waiting duration (C) in bang-bang controller"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed (214×214×3 mm) for thermal control"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan with 0.02 m³/s airflow for cooling"
]

instance Container : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ air volume"
]

instance RaspberryPi : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for system management"
]

instance PCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for current control"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for heatbed and fan"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains Heatbed, Fan, Container, RaspberryPi, PCB, PowerSupply, ThermometerInside1, ThermometerInside2, ThermometerOutside, VoltageSensor, CurrentSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Controller sends actuation commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan control) via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which translates them into hardware signals using MOSFETs and optocouplers for physical actuation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A centralized system where physical components (sensors, actuators) communicate with virtual components (models, controller) via RabbitMQ message broker, as illustrated in Fig. 7 with information flow between PT and DT components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the as-operated phase, integrating models and data from the deployed physical system for ongoing monitoring and optimization, as stated in the abstract: 'once the system is deployed, the models used to build it should not be discarded. Instead, they should be integrated into a Digital Twin.'"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Models validated through temperature uniformity tests (max 7°C discrepancy without fan voltage increase, reduced to 6°C at 18V) and parameter calibration minimizing residual error; Model B better captures thermal inertia of the heatbed compared to Model A."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker protocol for data exchange between physical and virtual components, with the controller and low-level driver listening to and publishing messages to the RabbitMQ server."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hosted on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B with RabbitMQ server running locally on the device, and all software components (controller, low-level driver) deployed on the same hardware."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "A safe protocol is incorporated into the low-level driver to maintain device safety, though specific cybersecurity measures or safety protocols for remote operations are not detailed in the document."
]
